2605.10833.title: MMVIAD: Multi-view Multi-task Video Understanding for Industrial Anomaly Detection
2605.10833.paper_summary: Industrial anomaly detection is critical for manufacturing quality control, yet existing datasets mainly focus on static images or sparse views, which do not fully reflect continuous inspection processes in real industrial scenarios. We introduce MMVIAD (Multi-view Multi-task Video Industrial Anomaly Detection), to the best of our knowledge the first continuous multi-view video dataset for industrial anomaly detection and understanding, together with a benchmark for multi-task evaluation. MMVIAD contains object-centric 2-second inspection clips with approximately 120 degrees of camera motion, covering 48 object categories, 14 environments, and 6 structural anomaly types. It supports anomaly detection, defect classification, object classification, and anomaly visible-time localization. Systematic evaluations on MMVIAD show that current commercial and open-source video MLLMs remain far below human performance, especially for fine-grained defect recognition and temporal grounding. To improve transferable anomaly understanding, we further develop a two-stage post-training pipeline where PS-SFT (Perception-Structured Supervised Fine-Tuning) initializes perception-structured reasoning and VISTA-GRPO (Visibility-grounded Industrial Structured Temporal Anomaly Group Relative Policy Optimization) refines the model with semantic-gated defect reward and visibility-aware temporal reward, producing the final model VISTA. On MMVIAD-Unseen, VISTA improves the base model's average score across the four tasks from 45.0 to 57.5, surpassing GPT-5.4. Source code is available at https://github.com/Georgekeepmoving/MMVIAD.
2605.10833.paper_summary_zh: 工業異常檢測對於製造質量控制至關重要，然而現有數據集主要集中於靜態圖像或稀疏視圖，這並未充分反映真實工業場景中的連續檢查過程。<lb/>我們介紹了MMVIAD（多視角多任務視頻工業異常檢測），據我們所知，這是首個用於工業異常檢測和理解的連續多視角視頻數據集，並提供了多任務評估的基準。<lb/>MMVIAD包含以物體為中心的2秒檢查片段，攝像機運動約120度，涵蓋48個物體類別、14個環境和6種類型的結構異常。<lb/>它支持異常檢測、缺陷分類、物體分類和異常可見時間定位。<lb/>對MMVIAD的系統評估顯示，當前商業和開源視頻MLLM的表現遠低於人類，特別是在細粒度缺陷識別和時間定位方面。<lb/>為了提高可轉移的異常理解，我們進一步開發了一個兩階段的後訓練管道，其中PS-SFT（感知結構化監督微調）初始化感知結構化推理，而VISTA-GRPO（基於可見性的工業結構化時間異常群體相對策略優化）則通過語義門控缺陷獎勵和可見性意識的時間獎勵來優化模型，最終生成模型VISTA。<lb/>在MMVIAD-Unseen上，VISTA將基礎模型在四個任務上的平均分數從45.0提高到57.5，超越了GPT-5.4。<lb/>源代碼可在https://github.com/Georgekeepmoving/MMVIAD獲得。
2605.10833.author: Xiran Zhao et.al.
2605.10833.authors: Xiran Zhao, Jing Jin, Yan Bai, Zhongan Wang, Yifeng Sun, Yihang Lou, Xuanyu Zhu, Tao Feng, Yingna Wu
